subcodes.first_line: O esteemed Ḥají Mírzá Ḥasan! Praise be unto God that through the grace and bounty of the Lord of Purpose thou hast been blessed with this most great gift [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب حاجی میرزا حسن الحمد لله بفضل و عنایت حضرت مقصود باین موهبت کبری موفق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @law of pilgrimage, @growth of the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
